text:
Market today: AI stock sentiment is split, with warnings about critical weeks ahead. This directly impacts your concentrated tech/chip book, especially with a potential selloff. Rising crude and ECB rate hike talks add macro pressure.

Your holdings: SOXL is down big (-37.26%) and is a leveraged product that decays; it needs immediate attention. SPAL is also a new, leveraged ETF down a massive -56.4%. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep a close eye on broader AI stock sentiment and any follow-through from IBM's guidance cut. Also, monitor crude prices and ECB rate hike chatter for macro signals.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged positions and respecting stops in this volatile, uncertain tech environment.
plays: SOXL: Consider trimming this leveraged ETF given its -37.26% loss and decay risk. Respect your stop.
SPAL: This new leveraged ETF is down -56.4%. Review its stop at 21.38; such a large loss demands immediate attention.
No new buys today - hold and watch. The market mood for tech is too uncertain for new long entries without a strong catalyst.
